evals.prompt: Before I submit my article there, can you check whether the journal "Bilig" is actually indexed in TR Dizin right now? I need to be sure it still counts.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-trdizin in journal-status mode: runs scripts/query_trdizin.py journal "Bilig" against https://search.trdizin.gov.tr/api/defaultSearch/journal/, parses hits.hits[]._source, and derives the verdict from isActive + journalYear coverage years vs rejectYearList (NOT from the query-time firstIndexDate/indexDate). Reports a 'Currently indexed in TR Dizin (active; coverage years …)' verdict with the ISSN/eISSN so the user can confirm the right journal, and notes status can change between terms. Does not assert the status from memory.

assertions.value: Queries the live TR Dizin API for the journal record and bases the indexed/not-indexed verdict on isActive/journalYear/rejectYearList, not on model memory or the query-time date fields.

evals.prompt: "Toplum ve Bilim" dergisi TR Dizin'de taranıyor mu, yoksa reddedildi mi? Doçentlik dosyam için kontrol etmem lazım.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-trdizin in journal-status mode on a Turkish-language request: runs scripts/query_trdizin.py journal "Toplum ve Bilim", inspects the record's rejectYearList, and reports a 'Rejected / not indexed' verdict listing the rejected years. Explicitly notes that this skill only reports TR Dizin status and does NOT compute doçentlik points — for the eligibility math it hands off to alterlab-docentlik-eligibility.

assertions.value: Handles the Turkish-language prompt, returns a rejected/not-indexed verdict from rejectYearList, and defers the doçentlik point calculation to alterlab-docentlik-eligibility instead of computing it here.

evals.prompt: Find me the most recent TR Dizin-indexed articles on deprem okuryazarlığı (earthquake literacy), newest first, with their journals and DOIs.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-trdizin in publication-search mode: runs scripts/query_trdizin.py publication "deprem okuryazarlığı" --order publicationYear-DESC against the defaultSearch/publication/ endpoint, parses _source (orderTitle, journal.name, doi, publicationYear, accessType), and returns a table of (year) title — journal · doi · access sorted newest-first, offering to narrow via the year/subject/language facets. Pages client-side for --limit since the API ignores a server-side limit.

assertions.value: Searches the publication endpoint with publicationYear-DESC ordering and returns indexed articles with journal + DOI, using client-side paging for the requested count.

evals.prompt: Here are five journals I've published in. Can you check which of them are currently in TR Dizin so I know which publications count as national-indexed venues?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-trdizin to run a journal-status check per venue via scripts/query_trdizin.py journal, returning a per-journal table of current TR Dizin status (active coverage years vs rejected) confirmed by ISSN. Reports only indexing status and explicitly does not compute career points — for doçentlik eligibility it routes to alterlab-docentlik-eligibility and for akademik teşvik scoring to alterlab-akademik-tesvik.

assertions.value: Produces a per-journal current-status table from the TR Dizin API and explicitly defers point/score computation to alterlab-docentlik-eligibility / alterlab-akademik-tesvik.

evals.prompt: Harvest all the article metadata from this DergiPark journal and give me BibTeX for each article so I can import them into Zotero.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-dergipark. The user wants to harvest article metadata and export BibTeX from a DergiPark-hosted journal (OAI-PMH harvest), which is journal hosting, not national-index status. alterlab-trdizin only searches the TR Dizin citation index and reports indexing status; DergiPark hosting does not imply TR Dizin indexing, so this is alterlab-dergipark's job.

evals.prompt: I've confirmed my journals are TR Dizin indexed. Now compute my total doçentlik points from this publication list and tell me whether I clear the minimum for my field.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-docentlik-eligibility. The user wants the doçentlik eligibility point arithmetic (per-field UAK table, author-share rule, mandatory minima) — not a TR Dizin status lookup, which they have already done. alterlab-trdizin verifies whether a journal is indexed but does not compute career points; the scoring belongs to alterlab-docentlik-eligibility.
